name: BFC — Workflow 8 — Magic Link Email Delivery

nodes.name: 02 · Code · Validate Input
nodes.notes: Validates required fields, document_type enum, issued_by CHECK enum, UUIDs, ttl bounds.

parameters.query:
SELECT s.id,
       s.company_name,
       s.contact_name,
       s.contact_email,
       gc.company_name AS gc_name
FROM   subcontractors s
LEFT JOIN gc_subcontractor_relationships rel
       ON rel.subcontractor_id = s.id
       AND rel.relationship_status = 'active'
LEFT JOIN gc_companies gc
       ON gc.id = rel.gc_id
WHERE  s.id = $1::uuid
LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: 04 · Postgres · Resolve Subcontractor
nodes.notes: Joins subcontractors → gc_subcontractor_relationships → gc_companies. Real columns: relationship_status, gc_id.

parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM generate_upload_token(
  $1::uuid,                  -- p_subcontractor_id
  $2::text,                  -- p_document_type
  NULLIF($3, 'null')::uuid,  -- p_site_order_id (NULLIF guards against n8n serializing JS null → string 'null')
  $4::text,                  -- p_issued_for_occurrence
  $5::text,                  -- p_issued_by
  $6::integer,               -- p_ttl_hours
  $7::boolean                -- p_verification_required
);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.subcontractor_id }},{{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.document_type }},{{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.site_order_id }},{{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.issued_for_occurrence }},{{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.issued_by }},{{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.ttl_hours }},{{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.verification_required }}

nodes.name: 06 · Postgres · Issue Token
nodes.notes: Calls generate_upload_token() RPC. Returns out_token, out_expires_at, out_replaced.

=
>_Blackflowcode.ai
DOCUMENT REQUEST · {{ ({ cert: 'COI', w9: 'W-9', lien_waiver: 'LIEN WAIVER', other: 'DOCUMENT' })[$('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.document_type] }}

We need your {{ ({ cert: 'COI', w9: 'W-9', lien_waiver: 'lien waiver', other: 'document' })[$('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.document_type] }}.

Hi {{ ($('04 · Postgres · Resolve Subcontractor').item.json.contact_name || 'there').split(' ')[0] }},

{{ $('04 · Postgres · Resolve Subcontractor').item.json.gc_name || 'A general contractor' }} needs an updated {{ ({ cert: 'Certificate of Insurance', w9: 'W-9 form', lien_waiver: 'Lien Waiver', other: 'Document' })[$('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.document_type] }} from {{ $('04 · Postgres · Resolve Subcontractor').item.json.company_name }} for the {{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.issued_for_occurrence }} occurrence. Use the secure link below to upload it. The link works for {{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.ttl_hours }} hours and can be used once.

Upload {{ ({ cert: 'COI', w9: 'W-9', lien_waiver: 'Lien Waiver', other: 'Document' })[$('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.document_type] }}

Or paste this URL into your browser:
https://uploads.blackflowcode.com/?token={{ $('06 · Postgres · Issue Token').item.json.out_token }}

What to expect
PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, or DOCX up to 10 MB. The page works on phone or computer — you can take a photo of a paper document if needed. We'll confirm by email as soon as it's received.

Questions? Reply to this email or call (516) 604-1804.
— The Blackflowcode team

This is a transactional message; you cannot unsubscribe from individual document requests.

nodes.name: 07 · Set · Build Email Body
nodes.notes: 11 assignments. No $env references. Uses hardcoded uploads.blackflowcode.com URL.

nodes.name: 08 · HTTP · Mailgun Send
nodes.notes: Form-encoded body required (Mailgun strips v: variables on JSON). From and Reply-To hardcoded.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO document_collection_log (
  subcontractor_id,
  document_type,
  site_order_id,
  occurrence_name,
  occurrence_day,
  email_to,
  email_from,
  email_subject,
  email_provider,
  email_message_id,
  token,
  status,
  sent_at,
  n8n_execution_id,
  n8n_workflow_id
) VALUES (
  $1::uuid, $2::text, NULLIF($3, 'null')::uuid, $4::text, 0,
  $5::text, $6::text, $7::text, 'Mailgun', $8::text,
  $9::uuid, 'sent', now(),
  $10::text, $11::text
)
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: {{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.subcontractor_id }},{{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.document_type }},{{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.site_order_id }},{{ $('02 · Code · Validate Input').item.json.body.occurrence_name }},{{ $('04 · Postgres · Resolve Subcontractor').item.json.contact_email }},{{ 'notifications@notifications.blackflowcodeai.com' }},{{ $('07 · Set · Build Email Body').item.json.email_subject }},{{ $('08 · HTTP · Mailgun Send').item.json.id }},{{ $('06 · Postgres · Issue Token').item.json.out_token }},{{ $execution.id }},{{ $workflow.id }}

nodes.name: 09 · Postgres · Insert Log Row
nodes.notes: Tokens table column = issued_for_occurrence; log table column = occurrence_name (schema asymmetry).

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, token: $('06 · Postgres · Issue Token').item.json.out_token, expires_at: $('06 · Postgres · Issue Token').item.json.out_expires_at, replaced_prior: $('06 · Postgres · Issue Token').item.json.out_replaced, mailgun_message_id: $('08 · HTTP · Mailgun Send').item.json.id, log_id: $json.id } }}
